name: Earl's Mozzarella Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to moderate (375°F). Line a jelly-roll pan with aluminum foil.
2. Saute onion in oil in a large skillet over medium heat for 3 minutes. Add red pepper, garlic, basil, and thyme; saute another 5 minutes.
3. Combine beef, pork, oats, egg whites, mozzarella, Parmesan cheese, parsley, optional salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Stir in the vegetable mixture.
4. Shape the mixture into an oval on the prepared pan.
5. Bake at moderate temperature (375°F) for 30 minutes. Brush loaf with catsup.
6. Bake another 25 minutes or until cooked through. Let stand 10 minutes before slicing.
Judi's Notes: I would bake this meat loaf in a loaf pan due to possible grease escaping from the jelly roll pan. I would also spoon off some of the fat from the loaf after 30 minutes.
